---
title: "CFB Models"
---

Model cards for the SportsDataverse / cfbfastR college-football models. Each
card reads like a methodology write-up — descended from the nflfastR EP/WP/CP
post and the cfbscrapR `EPA_WPA/` notebooks — and flows **Overview → Model
features → The model → Calibration Results → Feature importance → Limitations →
Provenance**.

The metrics are computed from honest out-of-sample evidence: the play-level
models report **leave-one-season-out (LOSO)** out-of-fold values, and the
fourth-down model reports first-down calibration on the full 2.2M-play corpus.
The signature calibration figures follow the cfbscrapR recipe exactly — the
**EP plot facets the 7 next-score classes**, and the **WP plots facet by
quarter** (predicted-probability bins vs empirical rate, point size = sample
count, loess fit, y=x reference, weighted-calibration-error caption).

## Models

| Model | Track | Predicts | Headline metric |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Expected Points](ep.md) | T1 | next-score EP (7-class softprob) | LOSO EP cal-MAE **0.014 pts** |
| [Win Probability — spread](wp_spread.md) | T1 | in-game WP with the pregame line | LOSO AUC **0.916** · spread-backfill logloss 0.362→**0.352** |
| [Win Probability — naive](wp_naive.md) | T1 | spread-free in-game WP | corr-vs-spread **0.94** |
| [QBR](qbr.md) | T1 | ESPN-style QBR (6-feat) | LOSO R² **0.585** · **+era** RMSE 17.9→**17.4** |
| [CPOE](cpoe.md) | T1 | completion % over expected (2004+) | — |
| [Fourth-Down Yards](fourth_down.md) | T2 | yards-gained distribution → go/punt/FG EV | first-down cal-MAE **0.005** · **+era** →**0.0027** |
| [Field Goal](fg.md) | T2 | placekick make probability by distance | LOSO cal-err **0.0085** · **+era** logloss →0.524 |
| [Expected Pass](xpass.md) | T2 | pre-snap dropback probability (`pass_oe`) | LOSO cal-err **0.0073** |
| [Two-Point Conversion](two_pt.md) | T2 | 2-pt success probability (go-for-2 vs XP) | LOSO cal-err **0.028** |
| [Punt outcome distribution](#related-model-suite-updates) | T2 | post-punt yardline distribution (`get_punt_wp`) | reproduces shipped artifact corr **0.9994** |
| [RB Evaluation (xREPA)](rb_eval.md) | T3 | expected rushing EPA above replacement | — |
| [Pregame WP (Five Factors)](pregame_wp.md) | T4 | pregame WP from the Five-Factors rating gap | LOSO WP cal-err **0.0115** (PtsDiff R² **0.535**) |

## Rule-era variables and spread backfill (2026 update)

Two interventions were evaluated under honest leave-one-season-out (LOSO) CV
(`model_training/era_experiment.py`; full table in `artifacts/era_report.md`).

**One-hot rule-era dummies (`era0..era3`)** — cuts 2006 / 2013 / 2020, i.e.
**2004–2006 / 2007–2013 / 2014–2020 / 2021+** (`ERA_BOUNDS`). Era was **adopted only
where the out-of-fold headline metric improved materially** (not at fold-noise level):

| Model | Era effect (LOSO) | Decision |
|---|---|---|
| QBR | RMSE 17.88 → **17.42** | ✅ adopt one-hot era (`qbr_era.ubj`) |
| Fourth-Down | first-down cal-MAE 0.0035 → **0.0027** | ✅ one-hot era replaces the ordinal factor (`fd_model_era.ubj`) |
| Field Goal | logloss 0.5258 → **0.5240** | ✅ adopt — modest (`fg_era.ubj`) |
| WP-spread / WP-naive / CPOE / xPass | Δ ≤ 0.0005 (fold noise) | — keep shipped recipe |
| Expected Points | cal-MAE 0.014 → 0.0175 (**worse**) | — drop (calibration regression) |
| Two-Point | logloss unchanged | — keep ordinal era |

**Spread backfill** — `model_training/spread_backfill.py` reconstructs a consensus
closing spread for the **2,167 games (mostly 2006–2011)** where ESPN ships no line,
from the `cfb_line_odds` multi-book history (consensus vs known spreads: **corr 0.93,
MAE 0.82 pts**; ESPN's `homeTeamSpread` uses the *positive = home-favored* convention,
so the market line is negated to match). The spread is the WP model's single most
important feature; backfilling it cut **WP-spread LOSO logloss 0.3616 → 0.3518
(−0.0098)** — a larger, era-independent win (`wp_spread_backfilled.ubj`).

The new `*_era.ubj` / `*_backfilled.ubj` artifacts are written **side-by-side** with the
shipped models for review; the canonical `.ubj` files are unchanged.

### Related model-suite updates

- **CPOE training window lowered to 2004** (was 2014). The 2014 floor was a legacy of the
  abandoned air-yards "Approach B"; the 8 game-state features + the `completion` target are
  100% populated every season back to 2004 (3× more data, and era now spans all four buckets).
- **Punt outcome distribution** — `model_training/punt_distribution.py` is the reproducible
  CFB build (nfl4th `punt_df` analog) for the `get_punt_wp` branch of the 4th-down decision
  surface, derived from 126k corpus punts (reproduces the shipped artifact to corr 0.9994).
- **`spread_time` sign fix** — the CFB 4th-down decision surface
  (`get_go_wp`/`get_fg_wp`/`get_punt_wp`) was feeding the WP model a sign-inverted
  `spread_time`; corrected to `+pos_team_spread · exp(−4·elapsed_share)` to match the
  trained-on convention (verified MAE 0.0 vs the training frame, and the NFL parity code).

All cards are regenerated by `python -m cfb_model_reports --artifacts artifacts
--out docs/models`. Render this site with `quarto render` from `docs/models/`.
